hero-title: Have you ever asked an AI a question and got back something fuzzy and not very helpful? It happens to almost everyone. The good news is that it's usually easy to fix, and it has very little to do with the AI itself.
Wondering why the AI keeps giving you answers that feel vague and not very useful? You're not alone — and it's easier to fix than you might think.
Why does AI give you such vague, useless answers?
Why does AI keep handing you vague, useless answers?
Why is AI so vague and useless?
hero-lede: Most of the time the AI isn't really the problem — the way you ask is. A “helper” is simply a clear way of asking that you can save and use again and again. Right here, you can build one bit by bit, and you'll watch the answer get better as you go. And the lovely part is, you never have to touch the AI itself.
Usually it isn't the AI — it's how you ask. A “helper” is just a clear ask you can reuse. Build one here, piece by piece, and watch the answer improve. You won't touch the AI once.

Almost always, it isn't the AI — it's the ask. A “helper” is just a clear ask you can reuse. Build one here, a piece at a time, and watch the answer change in front of you. You won't touch the AI once.
Almost always it's the ask, not the AI. A helper is a reusable, clear ask. Build one here, piece by piece, and watch the answer change. You won't touch the AI once.
It's the ask, not the AI. A helper is a reusable ask. Build one; watch it change. No AI required.
ask-hint: Go ahead and tap any piece below to add it to your ask. Each piece you add gives the AI a useful detail that it would otherwise just have to guess at.
Tap a piece to add it to your ask. Each one hands the AI a detail it can't guess on its own.
Tap a piece to add it. Each one tells the AI something it can't guess.
Tap a piece to add it — each tells the AI something it can't guess.
Tap to add. Each piece tells the AI what it can't guess.
how-title: Now it's time to make this your very own.
Now make it yours, in your own way.
how-sub: You've just learned the one move that matters most. Here's where that move can take you next.
You just learned the key move. Here's where it can take you next.
You just learned the move. Here's where it takes you.
You've learned the move. Here's where it leads.
You learned the move. Here's where it leads.
step1-title: Give it a go with something from your own life
Try it out on something real to you
step1-body: Do you have an ask of your own that you'd like to try? Bring it along to the free Advisor, and it will give you friendly, plain-English feedback on how to make it sharper and clearer.
Got an ask of your own in mind? Take it to the free Advisor for friendly, plain-English tips on sharpening it.
Got an ask of your own in mind? Bring it to the free Advisor and get plain-English feedback on how to sharpen it.
Have an ask of your own? Bring it to the free Advisor for plain-English feedback on sharpening it.
Bring your own ask to the free Advisor for plain-English feedback.
step2-title: Make a helper that stays with you for next time
Make a helper that sticks around for later
Make a helper that sticks around
Make a helper that sticks around
step2-body: Once an ask is working nicely, chatyman lets you save it as a little helper — with no code needed at all. It'll be ready and waiting whenever you need it, so you never have to start over from scratch each time.
Once an ask works, chatyman lets you save it as a little helper — no code — ready whenever you need it, so you needn't start over.
Once an ask works, chatyman lets you save it as a little helper — no code — ready whenever you need it, instead of starting from scratch each time.
When an ask works, chatyman saves it as a no-code helper, ready whenever you need it instead of starting over.
chatyman saves a working ask as a no-code, reusable helper.
step3-title: Get to understand why all of this actually works
step3-body: Would you like those satisfying “aha” moments? A handful of short, plain-spoken lessons explain what's really going on behind the scenes — and they quietly make everything you make turn out that little bit better.
Want the “aha” moments? A few short, plain lessons explain what's really going on — and quietly improve everything you make.
Want the “aha” moments? A few short, plain lessons explain what's really going on — and quietly make everything you make better.
Want the “aha” moments? A few short, plain lessons explain what's going on — and quietly improve everything you make.
Short plain lessons explain the why — and improve everything you make.
belong-title: Get a kind little nudge every now and then
Have a friendly nudge from time to time
Have a friendly nudge now and then
Have a friendly nudge now and then
A friendly nudge now and then
belong-body: Everyone who's here today started out feeling a little unsure too. You'll get gentle, jargon-free notes whenever there's something new and fun to try — and you'll find other people working it all out right alongside you.
Everyone here started out a bit unsure. Get gentle, no-jargon notes when there's something new to try — and find others figuring it out with you.
Everyone here started out a little unsure. Get gentle, no-jargon notes when there's something new to try — and find people figuring it out alongside you.
